pr.title: Record: Late Soft-Round QAT + Score-First Backward-Looking TTT — val_bpb 1.1178

output.summary: Late-stage soft-round QAT plus score-first backward-looking TTT on validation chunks nudges int6 weights before EMA/SWA.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Validation tokens are split into chunks that are scored and then trained on via score-first backward-looking TTT, so the adaptation uses only validation shards.
techniques: SGD adaptation with cosine LR decay under inference_mode scoring
